name: babystack
description: A fresh, local baby of your production backend for every test run and AI-agent session — real MySQL, seeded, disposable, zero test-code plumbing.
author: Sharvil Kadam

scripts.typecheck: turbo run typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:next
scripts.typecheck:next: node node_modules/typescript-next/bin/tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript-next/bin/tsc -p packages/docker/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript-next/bin/tsc -p packages/mysql/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript-next/bin/tsc -p packages/runtime/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript-next/bin/tsc -p packages/vitest/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript-next/bin/tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript-next/bin/tsc -p packages/babystack/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build && pnpm run smoke
